hover_backgroundBar.name: Hover background bar
hover_backgroundBar.title: Hover to reveal a background bar
hover_backgroundBar.about: Hover over a bar to reveal an initially invisible background rectangle behind it. The background fades when the pointer moves away.

select_scatterplot.name: Select by data attribute
select_scatterplot.title: Select marks by attribute value
select_scatterplot.about: Click a circle to select and highlight matching countries in the scatterplot while dimming the rest. Selection is not cumulative.

cumuSelect_scatterplot.name: Select Cumulatively
cumuSelect_scatterplot.title: Select Cumulatively by data attribute
cumuSelect_scatterplot.about: Click a circle to select and highlight matching countries in the scatterplot while dimming the rest. Selection is cumulative.

brush_slopeGraph.name: Select by 1D axis brushes
brush_slopeGraph.title: Brush axes to highlight marks
brush_slopeGraph.about:
This visualization shows that on average, percentage of obesity is inversely correlated with the percentage of population having a bachelor degree or higher. Each line represents a U.S. state. The left axis represents the obesity percentages, the right axis represents the percentages of people with a higher education.
Original visualization created by Alberto Cairo.

Interaction: Brush on either y-axis or both to highlight states within the selected value range and fade the rest. The brush can be resized and moved to adjust the selection interactively. Hover a line to emphasize it and show a tooltip with the state name.

brush_scatterplot.name: Select by 2D rect brush
brush_scatterplot.title: Select multiple marks in 2D region
brush_scatterplot.about: Drag a rectangular brush over the scatterplot to select points in a 2D region. Selected countries stay emphasized while points outside the brushed region fade. The rectangle can be resized and moved to adjust the selection interactively.

brush_areaChart.name: Brush to highlight area
brush_areaChart.title: Brush to highlight a region of an area chart
brush_areaChart.about: Drag a horizontal brush across the area chart to highlight a time range. The selected region lights up in red while the rest of the chart remains in blue. Clear the brush to reset.

lassoSelect_scatterplot.name: Lasso select
lassoSelect_scatterplot.title: Select multiple marks in freeform area
lassoSelect_scatterplot.about: Click multiple points to create a polygon, press the escape key to close the polygon. Marks within the polygon are selected.

flowSelect_DAG.name: Flow select
flowSelect_DAG.title: Hover to highlight outgoing flow paths
flowSelect_DAG.about: Hover over a node to trace outgoing flow paths in the directed graph. Connected links are highlighted in orange so local dependency flow is easier to follow.

showLabels_multiLineChart.name: One label for each series
showLabels_multiLineChart.title: One label for each series
showLabels_multiLineChart.about: Move cursor to reveal price labels for a particular date. The label is hidden if no price is available for that date.

showTooltip_multiLineChart.name: One tooltip for all series
showTooltip_multiLineChart.title: One tooltip for all series
showTooltip_multiLineChart.about: Move cursor to reveal a tooltip displaying values for a particular date.

compare_scatterplot.name: Pin & Compare
compare_scatterplot.title: Select a baseline, then compare
compare_scatterplot.about: Click a country to pin it as the reference point, then hover over another country to compare their statistics.

coordinate_areaChart.name: Overview + detail
coordinate_areaChart.title: Brush Overview to update detail view
coordinate_areaChart.about: This demo links two coordinated views: a focus area chart and a context chart below it. Brushing the lower overview updates the time window shown in the upper detail view. The brush can be resized and moved to explore different time ranges while the area chart updates accordingly.

coordinate_splom.name: Brush + link
coordinate_splom.title: Brush to highlight across all cells
coordinate_splom.about: Brush one cell in the scatterplot matrix to define an x/y range selection. The same subset is highlighted across all other cells to support multidimensional comparison. The brush can be resized and moved to adjust the selection interactively.

coordinate_splom_pan.name: Coordinated panning
coordinate_splom_pan.title: Pan one cell to update all cells
coordinate_splom_pan.about: Drag to pan any cell in the scatterplot matrix and all other cells update their axis domains in sync. This preserves the relative positioning of marks across views so multidimensional structure remains easy to compare.

brush_showTable.name: Display brushed data in table
brush_showTable.title: Display brushed data in table
brush_showTable.about: Brush the scatter plot to display the data of selected marks in a table.

crossfilter_histograms.name: Crossfilter histograms
crossfilter_histograms.title: Brush one histogram to filter the others
crossfilter_histograms.about: Three linked histograms show the distribution of flight distance, delay, and departure hour. Grey bars represent all 2000 flights; steelblue bars represent the current selection. Brush any histogram to crossfilter the other two — the blue bars update instantly to reflect the subset of flights that match the selected range.

celeste.name: Celeste: Topology
celeste.title: Celeste
celeste.about: A force-directed topology view of the Celeste system with type-based node coloring and labeled components. The layout supports interactive graph exploration as clusters and links settle into structure.

celeste_1.name: Celeste_1
celeste_1.title: Celeste
celeste_1.about: An alternate force-directed architecture graph for Celeste that emphasizes component types with color and a legend. The simulation enables interactive inspection of connectivity patterns in the system.

celeste_2.name: Celeste: Chord
celeste_2.title: Celeste
celeste_2.about: A chord diagram of Celeste port relationships in a circular layout. Hovering ribbons and labels highlights specific connections and reveals details through tooltip feedback.

celeste_infographics.name: Celeste: Infographics
celeste_infographics.title: Celeste
celeste_infographics.about: An infographic-style system walkthrough showing how data moves through Celeste services and storage layers. Visual emphasis and labeling make flow paths and component roles easy to inspect.

reconfigure_edgeBundling.name: Edge bundle strength
reconfigure_edgeBundling.title: Use slider to change bundling strength
reconfigure_edgeBundling.about: Use the slider to reconfigure edge-bundling strength in the network visualization. Adjusting the parameter changes how tightly edges are bundled together.

reconfigure_gridLayout.name: Layout parameters
reconfigure_gridLayout.title: Adjust layout parameters
reconfigure_gridLayout.about: Interactive controls let you change waffle chart layout parameters such as column count, start corner, and fill direction. The grid recomputes immediately to show layout changes.

reconfigure_rangeExtent.name: Scale range
reconfigure_rangeExtent.title: Drag axis to change range extent
reconfigure_rangeExtent.about: Drag the x-axis labels or ticks to adjust the temporal range extent mapped to the x-axis in the Gantt view. The size of the bars and the axis content update accordingly.

sort_lollipopChart.name: Mark order
sort_lollipopChart.title: Sort marks by attribute
sort_lollipopChart.about: Choose sorting attribute and order to reorder lollipop marks interactively. The chart can be sorted by crime rate or area in ascending or descending direction.

dynamic_binning.name: Dynamic binning
dynamic_binning.title: Dynamically change number of bins
dynamic_binning.about: Use the slider to dynamically adjust the number of bins in the histogram. The bar widths and heights update immediately to reflect the new binning.

encode_scatterplot.name: Change axis attribute
encode_scatterplot.title: Change data attribute mapped to axis
encode_scatterplot.about: Dropdown menus let you remap which data attributes are encoded on the x and y axes. This supports rapid exploration of different variable relationships in the same scatterplot.

filter_stackedAreaChart.name: Filter marks
filter_stackedAreaChart.title: Toggle mark visibility + auto re-layout
filter_stackedAreaChart.about: Toggle category checkboxes to filter industries included in the stacked area chart. This interaction isolates subsets so trends can be compared without visual clutter.

navigate_bubblePlot.name: Zoom and pan
navigate_bubblePlot.title: Zoom and pan a bubble plot
navigate_bubblePlot.about:
A visualization showing 1626 planets and which ones are habitable. Temperature should not be too hot or too cold. The mass also plays a role: a small planet can't have an atmosphere, while a large one will have a crushing atmosphere.
Original visualization by John Tomanio and Xaquin G.V., NGM STAFF.
Source: Abel Méndez, Planetary Habitability Laboratory, University of Puerto Rico at Arecibo.

Interaction: Use the mouse wheel to zoom and drag the background to pan, updating the x and y domains for exploratory navigation.

dimpVis.name: Drag to navigate through time
dimpVis.title: Drag mark to navigate through time
dimpVis.about: A recreation of the Vega demo demonstrating the DimpVis technique. Hovering over a mark (a country in a specific year) to show its trajectory over time. Dragging the mark navigates through time along the trajectory. All other marks are updated to reflect the new time.

derive_indexChart.name: Adjust baseline
derive_indexChart.title: Mouse move to adjust baseline date
derive_indexChart.about: Move the pointer along the timeline to choose a baseline date, then view all series re-indexed relative to that point. The chart derives percentage change from the selected baseline for comparison.

RC_VIS1.name: RC_VIS
RC_VIS1.title: Character Connections
RC_VIS1.about: An edge-bundled character network with a control to tune bundling strength. Hover interactions emphasize each node's local connections while de-emphasizing the rest of the graph.

IP_Theft.name: IP_Theft
IP_Theft.title: Infographic
IP_Theft.about: A staged infographic narrative of IP theft scenarios. Use keyboard navigation to step through attack phases and reveal each sequence progressively.
